name: Spaghetti with Zesty Marinara Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1/8 teaspoon hot red pepper flakes or to taste
1 can No-salt-added tomatoes, crushed with liquid (16-ounce)
1/2 cup grated Parmesan cheese, or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a heavy non-aluminum skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add garlic and onion, stirring until they are limp.
3. Stir in tomato paste, parsley, herbs, salt, black pepper, sugar, and red pepper flakes. Cook for 3-4 minutes, stirring often.
4. Combine water, wine, bay leaf, tomato sauce, crushed tomatoes with liquid, and bring to a boil.
5. Reduce heat and simmer for 1 to 1-1/2 hours.
6. Remove the bay leaf from the sauce.
7. Cook spaghetti according to package directions, omitting salt. Drain and serve with sauce.
8. Sprinkle dish with Parmesan cheese.
Makes 8 servings (2 ounces spaghetti and 1/2 cup sauce per serving).
